title: [12 Ounces(350), 50Pcs, White 100% Compostable Paper Disposable Bowls, Made of Bagasse Fibers, Eco-Friendly and Natural Biodegradable, Perfect for Salad, Soup, Dessert
features: Good Quality with 50 Pieces, Easy to use
Biodegradable and Eco-Friendly，Microwafe Safe and Freezable, Compostable and Disposable
Perfect for Salad, Soup or Noddle
Party, Picnic, Wedding, and all other Occasion, Suitable for all kinds of holidays and party
description: Eco-Housing Partner paper Bowls are designed strong, Eco-friendly, disposable. The Bowls are easy to use for you, which makes you can spend more time on what people matters. Perfectly for everything from quick snacks to get-togethers with family and friends, you will love having these disposable Bowls on hand. And the Bowls are made of sugar cane fibers, which is a renewable waste residue of the sugarcane after the sugarcane pulp is extracted. Although it’s paper-based product, the Bowls are designed more sturdier and will not break or crack under a full Bowls of pressure. Finally, the Bowls are 100% biodegradable and 100% compostable, which can be disposed of gradually in a compost pile or just buried in the backyard.
